productDisplayName: Baggit Women Princy Taj Teal Belt
description: A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this slim belt from baggit is made of textured leatherette for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies!Made of leatherette for durability and styleHas a textured upperTang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitCareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
